analects.notes: Teachings of Confucius assembled by students and later editors

socrates_corpus.notes: Socrates wrote no books; known through Plato, Xenophon, and others

mencius.notes: Attributed to Mencius (孟子, Meng Ke); compiled and edited across Warring States and Han

zhuangzi.notes: Core chapters linked to Zhuang Zhou; outer chapters likely later additions

symposium.notes: Platonic dialogue; Socrates is a character, not the author

enchiridion.notes: Arrian compiled teachings of Epictetus; not Plato or Socrates

apology.notes: Plato's dialogue; Socrates speaks but did not author the text

don_quixote.provenance: Universally attributed to Miguel de Cervantes; published in two parts, 1605 and 1615.

paradise_lost.provenance: Epic poem published by John Milton in 1667 (revised 1674); authorship is settled.

the_divine_comedy.provenance: Composed by Dante Alighieri c.1308-1320; authorship universally established.

hamlet.provenance: Tragedy by William Shakespeare, written c.1600; first printed 1603/1604.

macbeth.provenance: Tragedy by William Shakespeare, c.1606; printed in the First Folio (1623).

pride_and_prejudice.provenance: Novel by Jane Austen, published 1813; authorship is settled.

war_and_peace.provenance: Novel by Leo Tolstoy, serialized and published 1865-1869.

the_brothers_karamazov.provenance: Final novel of Fyodor Dostoevsky, published 1880.

the_hunchback_of_notre_dame.provenance: Novel by Victor Hugo, published 1831 (Notre-Dame de Paris).

the_count_of_monte_cristo.provenance: Novel by Alexandre Dumas (with collaborator Auguste Maquet), serialized 1844-1846.

faust.provenance: Dramatic poem by Johann Wolfgang von Goethe; Part One 1808, Part Two 1832.

the_sorrows_of_young_werther.provenance: Epistolary novel by Johann Wolfgang von Goethe, published 1774.

don_juan.provenance: Satirical epic poem by Lord Byron (George Gordon), published 1819-1824.

jane_eyre.provenance: Novel by Charlotte Brontë, published 1847 under the pen name Currer Bell.

wuthering_heights.provenance: Sole novel of Emily Brontë, published 1847 under the pen name Ellis Bell.

adventures_of_huckleberry_finn.provenance: Novel published 1884-1885 by Samuel Clemens under his well-known pen name Mark Twain.

the_trial.provenance: Novel by Franz Kafka, written 1914-1915, published posthumously 1925.

in_search_of_lost_time.provenance: Novel sequence by Marcel Proust, published 1913-1927.

one_hundred_years_of_solitude.provenance: Novel by Gabriel García Márquez, published 1967.

decameron.provenance: Collection of novellas by Giovanni Boccaccio, composed c.1349-1353.

the_canterbury_tales.provenance: Collection of stories by Geoffrey Chaucer, composed c.1387-1400.

gulliver_s_travels.provenance: Satirical novel by Jonathan Swift, published 1726.

dream_of_the_red_chamber.provenance: Novel by Cao Xueqin, composed mid-18th century (later chapters edited by Gao E).

romance_of_the_three_kingdoms.provenance: Historical novel traditionally attributed to Luo Guanzhong, 14th century.

journey_to_the_west.provenance: Novel conventionally attributed to Wu Cheng'en, 16th century (Ming dynasty).

water_margin.provenance: Novel traditionally attributed to Shi Nai'an, 14th century.

the_tale_of_genji.provenance: Novel by Murasaki Shikibu, composed early 11th century.

shahnameh.provenance: Persian epic completed by Ferdowsi c.1010 CE.

masnavi.provenance: Sufi poem by Jalal al-Din Rumi, composed 13th century.

rubaiyat_of_omar_khayyam.provenance: Quatrains traditionally attributed to Omar Khayyam, 11th-12th century.

muqaddimah.provenance: Introduction to history by Ibn Khaldun, completed 1377.

the_prince.provenance: Political treatise by Niccolò Machiavelli, written 1513, published 1532.

leviathan.provenance: Political philosophy by Thomas Hobbes, published 1651.

two_treatises_of_government.provenance: Political work by John Locke, published 1689.

discourse_on_the_method.provenance: Philosophical work by René Descartes, published 1637.

ethics.provenance: Philosophical treatise by Baruch Spinoza, published posthumously 1677.

critique_of_pure_reason.provenance: Philosophical work by Immanuel Kant, first edition 1781.

an_enquiry_concerning_human_understandin.provenance: Philosophical work by David Hume, published 1748.

the_wealth_of_nations.provenance: Treatise on political economy by Adam Smith, published 1776.

das_kapital.provenance: Work of political economy by Karl Marx; Volume I published 1867.

thus_spoke_zarathustra.provenance: Philosophical work by Friedrich Nietzsche, published 1883-1885.

the_world_as_will_and_representation.canonicalTitleEn: The World as Will and Representation
the_world_as_will_and_representation.provenance: Philosophical work by Arthur Schopenhauer, published 1818-1819.

on_the_origin_of_species.provenance: Scientific work by Charles Darwin, published 1859.

philosophiae_naturalis_principia_mathema.provenance: Foundational physics treatise by Isaac Newton, published 1687.

dialogue_concerning_the_two_chief_world_.canonicalTitleEn: Dialogue Concerning the Two Chief World Systems
dialogue_concerning_the_two_chief_world_.provenance: Scientific work by Galileo Galilei, published 1632.

on_the_revolutions_of_the_heavenly_spher.canonicalTitleEn: On the Revolutions of the Heavenly Spheres
on_the_revolutions_of_the_heavenly_spher.provenance: Astronomical work by Nicolaus Copernicus, published 1543.

relativity_the_special_and_the_general_t.canonicalTitleEn: Relativity: The Special and the General Theory
relativity_the_special_and_the_general_t.provenance: Popular exposition by Albert Einstein, published 1916.

the_interpretation_of_dreams.provenance: Psychological work by Sigmund Freud, published 1899 (dated 1900).

candide.provenance: Satirical novella published 1759 by François-Marie Arouet under his pen name Voltaire.

the_social_contract.provenance: Political philosophy by Jean-Jacques Rousseau, published 1762.

the_spirit_of_the_laws.provenance: Treatise on political and legal theory by Montesquieu, published 1748.

commentaries_on_the_laws_of_england.canonicalTitleEn: Commentaries on the Laws of England
commentaries_on_the_laws_of_england.provenance: Treatise on English common law by William Blackstone, published 1765-1769.

the_history_of_the_decline_and_fall_of_t.canonicalTitleEn: The History of the Decline and Fall of the Roman Empire

the_histories.provenance: Historical work by Herodotus of Halicarnassus, 5th century BCE.

history_of_the_peloponnesian_war.provenance: Historical work by Thucydides, late 5th century BCE.

oedipus_rex.provenance: Tragedy by Sophocles, performed c.429 BCE.

medea.provenance: Tragedy by Euripides, first produced 431 BCE.

metamorphoses.provenance: Narrative poem by Ovid (Publius Ovidius Naso), completed c.8 CE.

novum_organum.provenance: Philosophical work by Francis Bacon, published 1620.

summa_theologica.provenance: Theological work by Thomas Aquinas, composed 1265-1274 (left unfinished).

confessions.provenance: Autobiographical work by Augustine of Hippo, composed c.397-400 CE.

the_great_gatsby.provenance: Novel by F. Scott Fitzgerald, published 1925; authorship is settled.

the_old_man_and_the_sea.canonicalTitleEn: The Old Man and the Sea

nausea.provenance: Novel by Jean-Paul Sartre, published 1938 (La Nausée).

the_metamorphosis.provenance: Novella by Franz Kafka, published 1915 (Die Verwandlung).

the_magic_mountain.provenance: Novel by Thomas Mann, published 1924 (Der Zauberberg).

steppenwolf.provenance: Novel by Hermann Hesse, published 1927 (Der Steppenwolf).

the_catcher_in_the_rye.provenance: Novel by J. D. Salinger, published 1951.

ficciones.provenance: Short-story collection by Jorge Luis Borges, published 1944.

the_tin_drum.provenance: Novel by Günter Grass, published 1959 (Die Blechtrommel).

the_leopard.provenance: Novel by Giuseppe Tomasi di Lampedusa, published posthumously 1958 (Il Gattopardo).

the_name_of_the_rose.provenance: Novel by Umberto Eco, published 1980 (Il nome della rosa).

snow_country.provenance: Novel by Yasunari Kawabata, serialized 1935-1937, completed 1948 (Yukiguni).

season_of_migration_to_the_north.canonicalTitleEn: Season of Migration to the North
season_of_migration_to_the_north.provenance: Novel by Tayeb Salih, published 1966 (Mawsim al-Hijra ila al-Shamal).

the_cairo_trilogy.provenance: Novel trilogy by Naguib Mahfouz, published 1956-1957.

the_master_and_margarita.provenance: Novel by Mikhail Bulgakov, written 1928-1940, published 1966-1967.

one_day_in_the_life_of_ivan_denisovich.canonicalTitleEn: One Day in the Life of Ivan Denisovich

eugene_onegin.provenance: Novel in verse by Alexander Pushkin, published 1825-1832.

leaves_of_grass.provenance: Poetry collection by Walt Whitman, first published 1855 and expanded through 1892.

the_waste_land.provenance: Poem by T. S. Eliot, published 1922.

duino_elegies.provenance: Poetry cycle by Rainer Maria Rilke, completed 1922, published 1923 (Duineser Elegien).

the_flowers_of_evil.provenance: Poetry collection by Charles Baudelaire, published 1857 (Les Fleurs du mal).

the_divan_of_hafez.provenance: Collected ghazals of Hafez of Shiraz, 14th century.

shakespeares_sonnets.provenance: Sequence of 154 sonnets by William Shakespeare, published 1609.

the_faerie_queene.provenance: Epic poem by Edmund Spenser, published 1590-1596.

the_rime_of_the_ancient_mariner.canonicalTitleEn: The Rime of the Ancient Mariner
the_rime_of_the_ancient_mariner.provenance: Poem by Samuel Taylor Coleridge, published 1798.

a_dolls_house.provenance: Play by Henrik Ibsen, premiered 1879 (Et dukkehjem).

the_cherry_orchard.provenance: Play by Anton Chekhov, premiered 1904 (Vishnyovy sad).

waiting_for_godot.provenance: Play by Samuel Beckett, premiered 1953 (En attendant Godot).

pygmalion.provenance: Play by George Bernard Shaw, premiered 1913.

the_blood_wedding.provenance: Play by Federico García Lorca, premiered 1933 (Bodas de sangre).

tartuffe.provenance: Comedy first performed 1664 by Jean-Baptiste Poquelin under his stage name Molière.

general_theory_of_employment_interest_an.canonicalTitleEn: The General Theory of Employment, Interest and Money
general_theory_of_employment_interest_an.provenance: Economics treatise by John Maynard Keynes, published 1936.

principles_of_political_economy_and_taxa.canonicalTitleEn: On the Principles of Political Economy and Taxation
principles_of_political_economy_and_taxa.provenance: Economics treatise by David Ricardo, published 1817.

the_structure_of_scientific_revolutions.provenance: Work in philosophy of science by Thomas Kuhn, published 1962.

tractatus_logico_philosophicus.provenance: Philosophical work by Ludwig Wittgenstein, published 1921.

being_and_time.provenance: Philosophical work by Martin Heidegger, published 1927 (Sein und Zeit).

the_second_sex.provenance: Philosophical work by Simone de Beauvoir, published 1949 (Le Deuxième Sexe).

a_theory_of_justice.provenance: Work in political philosophy by John Rawls, published 1971.

the_elements.provenance: Mathematical treatise by Euclid of Alexandria, c.300 BCE.

almagest.provenance: Astronomical treatise by Claudius Ptolemy, 2nd century CE.

on_the_fabric_of_the_human_body.canonicalTitleEn: On the Fabric of the Human Body
on_the_fabric_of_the_human_body.provenance: Anatomical treatise by Andreas Vesalius, published 1543 (De humani corporis fabrica).

the_selfish_gene.provenance: Popular science book by Richard Dawkins, published 1976.

silent_spring.provenance: Environmental science book by Rachel Carson, published 1962.

a_brief_history_of_time.provenance: Popular science book by Stephen Hawking, published 1988.

godel_escher_bach.canonicalTitleEn: Gödel, Escher, Bach: an Eternal Golden Braid

principia_mathematica_whitehead_russell.provenance: Foundational logic work co-authored by Alfred North Whitehead and Bertrand Russell, published 1910-1913.

democracy_in_america.provenance: Political study by Alexis de Tocqueville, published 1835-1840 (De la démocratie en Amérique).

reflections_on_the_revolution_in_france.canonicalTitleEn: Reflections on the Revolution in France
reflections_on_the_revolution_in_france.provenance: Political treatise by Edmund Burke, published 1790.

common_sense.provenance: Pamphlet by Thomas Paine advocating American independence, published 1776.

the_gallic_wars.provenance: Firsthand military account by Julius Caesar, written c.58-49 BCE (Commentarii de Bello Gallico).

the_book_of_optics.provenance: Optics treatise by Ibn al-Haytham (Alhazen), composed c.1011-1021 (Kitab al-Manazir).

the_canon_of_medicine.provenance: Medical encyclopedia by Ibn Sina (Avicenna), completed 1025 (al-Qanun fi al-Tibb).

the_compendious_book_on_calculation_by_c.canonicalTitleEn: The Compendious Book on Calculation by Completion and Balancing
the_compendious_book_on_calculation_by_c.provenance: Foundational algebra treatise by al-Khwarizmi, c.820 CE.

a_portrait_of_the_artist_as_a_young_man.canonicalTitleEn: A Portrait of the Artist as a Young Man

nineteen_eighty_four.provenance: Novel published 1949 by Eric Arthur Blair under his pen name George Orwell.

animal_farm.provenance: Allegorical novella published 1945 by Eric Arthur Blair under his pen name George Orwell.

selected_poems_li_bai.provenance: Core corpus of shi poetry by the High Tang poet Li Bai (701-762 CE); transmitted in well-documented anthologies.

selected_poems_du_fu.provenance: Shi poetry by the High Tang poet Du Fu (712-770 CE); preserved and annotated through centuries of Chinese scholarship.

selected_poems_wang_wei.provenance: Landscape and Buddhist-inflected Tang poems by Wang Wei (699-761 CE); well-attested in the literary record.

selected_poems_bai_juyi.provenance: Tang poet Bai Juyi (772-846 CE), including 'Song of Everlasting Sorrow'; authorship documented in his self-compiled collected works.

strange_tales_from_a_chinese_studio.canonicalTitleEn: Strange Tales from a Chinese Studio
strange_tales_from_a_chinese_studio.provenance: Classical-Chinese tale collection by Pu Songling (1640-1715), Qing dynasty; authorship well-documented.

comprehensive_mirror_in_aid_of_governanc.canonicalTitleEn: Comprehensive Mirror in Aid of Governance
comprehensive_mirror_in_aid_of_governanc.provenance: Chronicle history compiled under the direction of Sima Guang (1019-1086), Northern Song; presented to the throne in 1084.

six_records_of_a_floating_life.canonicalTitleEn: Six Records of a Floating Life
six_records_of_a_floating_life.provenance: Autobiographical memoir by Shen Fu (1763-c.1825), Qing dynasty; authorship established despite later partial loss of the text.

the_peony_pavilion.provenance: Kunqu chuanqi play by Tang Xianzu (1550-1616), Ming dynasty; completed 1598, authorship undisputed.

the_orphan_of_zhao.provenance: Yuan dynasty zaju play attributed to Ji Junxiang (13th c.); well-established in the Yuan dramatic canon.

the_romance_of_the_western_chamber.canonicalTitleEn: The Romance of the Western Chamber
the_romance_of_the_western_chamber.provenance: Yuan dynasty zaju play by Wang Shifu (c.1250-1300); the standard attribution in Chinese dramatic scholarship.

the_pillow_book.provenance: Heian-era zuihitsu by the court lady Sei Shōnagon (c.966-1017/1025); compiled c.1002.

the_narrow_road_to_the_deep_north.canonicalTitleEn: The Narrow Road to the Deep North
the_narrow_road_to_the_deep_north.provenance: Haibun travel diary by Matsuo Bashō (1644-1694), Edo period; written c.1689-1694.

the_love_suicides_at_sonezaki.provenance: Bunraku/jōruri play by Chikamatsu Monzaemon (1653-1724); first performed 1703.

the_life_of_an_amorous_man.canonicalTitleEn: The Life of an Amorous Man
the_life_of_an_amorous_man.provenance: Ukiyo-zōshi novel by Ihara Saikaku (1642-1693), Edo period; published 1682.

tales_of_moonlight_and_rain.provenance: Collection of supernatural tales by Ueda Akinari (1734-1809); published 1776.

rashomon_akutagawa.provenance: Short stories by Ryūnosuke Akutagawa (1892-1927); 'Rashōmon' published 1915.

thousand_cranes.provenance: Novel by Yasunari Kawabata (1899-1972), Nobel laureate; serialized 1949-1952.

the_temple_of_the_golden_pavilion.canonicalTitleEn: The Temple of the Golden Pavilion

a_personal_matter.provenance: Novel by Kenzaburō Ōe (1935-2023), Nobel laureate; published 1964.

kusamakura.provenance: Novel by Natsume Sōseki (1867-1916), Meiji period; published 1906.

the_abe_clan.provenance: Historical novella by Mori Ōgai (1862-1922); published 1913.

the_recognition_of_shakuntala.provenance: Classical Sanskrit play (Abhijñānaśākuntalam) traditionally attributed to Kālidāsa, c. 4th-5th c. CE.

meghaduta.provenance: Sanskrit lyric poem (Meghadūta) attributed to Kālidāsa, c. 4th-5th c. CE; authorship traditionally settled.

the_little_clay_cart.provenance: Sanskrit drama (Mṛcchakaṭika) traditionally attributed to King Śūdraka, c. 2nd-5th c. CE.

gitanjali.provenance: Bengali poetry collection by Rabindranath Tagore (1861-1941); English version 1912, Nobel Prize 1913.

the_home_and_the_world.provenance: Bengali novel by Rabindranath Tagore (1861-1941); published 1916.

godan.provenance: Hindi novel by Premchand (Dhanpat Rai Srivastava, 1880-1936); published 1936.

tirukkural.provenance: Classical Tamil ethical couplet collection attributed to Thiruvalluvar, c. 1st c. BCE-5th c. CE; traditional authorship settled.

silappatikaram.provenance: Tamil epic traditionally attributed to the prince-poet Iḷaṅkō Aṭikaḷ, c. 5th-6th c. CE.

ramcharitmanas.provenance: Awadhi retelling of the Rama story by Goswami Tulsidas (1532-1623); composed from 1574.

abhijnana_gita_govinda.provenance: Sanskrit devotional lyric cycle by Jayadeva (12th c.), court poet of Bengal.

the_conference_of_the_birds.provenance: Persian Sufi allegorical poem (Manṭiq-uṭ-Ṭayr) by Farīd ud-Dīn ʿAṭṭār (c.1145-c.1221).

layla_and_majnun.provenance: Persian narrative poem by Nizami Ganjavi (1141-1209); composed 1188 as part of the Khamsa.

khosrow_and_shirin.provenance: Persian romance by Nizami Ganjavi (1141-1209), part of the Khamsa; completed 1180.

the_gulistan.provenance: Persian prose-and-verse work by Saadi of Shiraz (c.1210-c.1291/2); completed 1258.

the_bustan.provenance: Persian didactic verse by Saadi of Shiraz (c.1210-c.1291/2); completed 1257.

the_spring_garden_jami.provenance: Persian prose-and-verse work by Abd al-Rahman Jami (1414-1492); completed 1487.

muallaqa_imru_al_qais.provenance: Pre-Islamic ode (qasida) of the Mu'allaqat attributed to Imru' al-Qais (6th c. CE); the most celebrated of the suspended odes.

muallaqa_labid.provenance: Pre-Islamic Mu'allaqat ode attributed to Labīd ibn Rabīʿa (c.560-661 CE).

muallaqa_antarah.canonicalTitleEn: The Mu'allaqa of Antarah ibn Shaddad
muallaqa_antarah.provenance: Pre-Islamic Mu'allaqat ode attributed to the warrior-poet ʿAntarah ibn Shaddād (6th c. CE).

diwan_al_mutanabbi.provenance: Collected Arabic panegyric and wisdom poetry of al-Mutanabbī (915-965 CE), Abbasid era; well-attested.

the_epistle_of_forgiveness.provenance: Arabic prose work (Risālat al-Ghufrān) by Abū al-ʿAlāʾ al-Maʿarrī (973-1057).

the_book_of_misers.provenance: Arabic prose work (Kitāb al-Bukhalāʾ) by al-Jāḥiẓ (c.776-868/9), Abbasid Basra.

palace_walk_mahfouz.provenance: First novel of the Cairo Trilogy by Naguib Mahfouz (1911-2006), Nobel laureate; published 1956.

men_in_the_sun.provenance: Arabic novella by Ghassan Kanafani (1936-1972); published 1962.

death_and_the_kings_horseman.provenance: Play by Wole Soyinka (b.1934), Nigerian Nobel laureate; first published 1975.

weep_not_child.provenance: Novel by Ngũgĩ wa Thiong'o (b.1938), Kenyan; published 1964.

disgrace_coetzee.provenance: Novel by J. M. Coetzee (b.1940), South African Nobel laureate; published 1999.

julys_people.provenance: Novel by Nadine Gordimer (1923-2014), South African Nobel laureate; published 1981.

so_long_a_letter.provenance: Epistolary novel by Mariama Bâ (1929-1981), Senegalese; published in French 1979.

gods_bits_of_wood.provenance: Novel by Ousmane Sembène (1923-2007), Senegalese; published in French 1960.

the_palm_wine_drinkard.provenance: Novel by Amos Tutuola (1920-1997), Nigerian; published 1952.

the_beautyful_ones_are_not_yet_born.canonicalTitleEn: The Beautyful Ones Are Not Yet Born
the_beautyful_ones_are_not_yet_born.provenance: Novel by Ayi Kwei Armah (b.1939), Ghanaian; published 1968.

nervous_conditions.provenance: Novel by Tsitsi Dangarembga (b.1959), Zimbabwean; published 1988.

the_radiance_of_the_king.provenance: Novel by Camara Laye (1928-1980), Guinean; published in French 1954.

i_the_supreme.provenance: Dictator novel by Augusto Roa Bastos (1917-2005), Paraguayan; published in Spanish 1974.

the_kingdom_of_this_world.provenance: Novel by Alejo Carpentier (1904-1980), Cuban; published in Spanish 1949.

the_house_of_the_spirits.provenance: Novel by Isabel Allende (b.1942), Chilean; published in Spanish 1982.

twenty_love_poems_neruda.canonicalTitleEn: Twenty Love Poems and a Song of Despair
twenty_love_poems_neruda.provenance: Poetry collection by Pablo Neruda (1904-1973), Chilean Nobel laureate; published 1924.

the_labyrinth_of_solitude.provenance: Essay collection on Mexican identity by Octavio Paz (1914-1998), Nobel laureate; published 1950.

middlemarch.provenance: Novel by George Eliot (Mary Ann Evans, 1819-1880); serialized 1871-1872.

vanity_fair.provenance: Novel by William Makepeace Thackeray (1811-1863); serialized 1847-1848.

bel_ami.provenance: Novel by Guy de Maupassant (1850-1893); published 1885.

germinal.provenance: Novel by Émile Zola (1840-1902), part of the Rougon-Macquart cycle; published 1885.

pere_goriot.provenance: Novel by Honoré de Balzac (1799-1850), part of La Comédie humaine; published 1835.

buddenbrooks.provenance: Novel by Thomas Mann (1875-1955), Nobel laureate; published 1901.

the_betrothed_manzoni.provenance: Historical novel by Alessandro Manzoni (1785-1873); definitive edition 1840-1842.

the_house_by_the_medlar_tree.canonicalTitleEn: The House by the Medlar Tree

hunger_hamsun.provenance: Novel by Knut Hamsun (1859-1952), Norwegian Nobel laureate; published 1890.

kristin_lavransdatter.provenance: Medieval-set trilogy by Sigrid Undset (1882-1949), Norwegian Nobel laureate; published 1920-1922.

the_diary_of_a_madman_lu_xun.canonicalTitleEn: The Diary of a Madman and Other Stories
the_diary_of_a_madman_lu_xun.provenance: Short fiction by Lu Xun (Zhou Shuren, 1881-1936); 'Diary of a Madman' published 1918.

rickshaw_boy.provenance: Novel by Lao She (Shu Qingchun, 1899-1966); serialized 1936-1937.

family_ba_jin.provenance: Novel by Ba Jin (Li Yaotang, 1904-2005); published 1933.

red_sorghum.provenance: Novel by Mo Yan (Guan Moye, b.1955), Nobel laureate; published 1986-1987.

the_vegetarian_han_kang.provenance: Novel by Han Kang (b.1970), South Korean Nobel laureate; published in Korean 2007.

please_look_after_mom.provenance: Novel by Shin Kyung-sook (b.1963), South Korean; published in Korean 2008.

the_sympathizer.provenance: Novel by Viet Thanh Nguyen (b.1971), Vietnamese-American; published 2015, Pulitzer Prize 2016.

the_sorrow_of_war.provenance: Novel by Bảo Ninh (b.1952), Vietnamese; published in Vietnamese 1990.

the_tale_of_kieu.provenance: Vietnamese narrative poem (Truyện Kiều) by Nguyễn Du (1766-1820); composed early 19th c.

the_buried_giant.provenance: Novel by Kazuo Ishiguro (b.1954), British Nobel laureate; published 2015.

my_name_is_red.provenance: Novel by Orhan Pamuk (b.1952), Turkish Nobel laureate; published in Turkish 1998.

memed_my_hawk.provenance: Novel by Yaşar Kemal (1923-2015), Turkish; published in Turkish 1955.

the_blind_owl.provenance: Novella by Sadegh Hedayat (1903-1951), Iranian; published in Persian 1936-1937.

the_radiance_of_hafez_divan.provenance: Collected ghazals of Saib Tabrizi (1592-1676), foremost poet of the Persian 'Indian style'; well-attested.

the_emperor_kapuscinski.provenance: Literary reportage by Ryszard Kapuściński (1932-2007), Polish; published in Polish 1978.

solaris_lem.provenance: Novel by Stanisław Lem (1921-2006), Polish; published in Polish 1961.

the_good_soldier_svejk.provenance: Satirical novel by Jaroslav Hašek (1883-1923), Czech; published 1921-1923 (unfinished).

rur_capek.provenance: Play by Karel Čapek (1890-1938), Czech; premiered 1921, coined the word 'robot'.

zorba_the_greek.canonicalTitleZh: Βίος και Πολιτεία του Αλέξη Ζορμπά
zorba_the_greek.provenance: Novel by Nikos Kazantzakis (1883-1957), Greek; published in Greek 1946.

the_house_of_the_dead_dostoevsky.provenance: Semi-autobiographical novel by Fyodor Dostoevsky (1821-1881); published 1860-1862.

oblomov.provenance: Novel by Ivan Goncharov (1812-1891), Russian; published 1859.

and_quiet_flows_the_don.provenance: Novel by Mikhail Sholokhov (1905-1984), Russian Nobel laureate; published 1928-1940.

the_radiance_petals_kabir.provenance: Devotional verses (sakhi, ramaini, shabda) attributed to the 15th-c. North Indian sant poet Kabir; core authorship traditionally settled.

the_pinjar.provenance: Novel by Amrita Pritam (1919-2005), Punjabi; published in Punjabi 1950.

toba_tek_singh.canonicalTitleEn: Toba Tek Singh and Other Stories
toba_tek_singh.provenance: Urdu short fiction by Saadat Hasan Manto (1912-1955); 'Toba Tek Singh' published 1955.

umrao_jaan_ada.provenance: Urdu novel by Mirza Hadi Ruswa (1857-1931); published 1899.

the_diwan_of_ghalib.provenance: Urdu and Persian ghazals of Mirza Asadullah Khan Ghalib (1797-1869), Delhi; collected in his Diwan.

micrographia.provenance: Published by Robert Hooke for the Royal Society, 1665.

treatise_on_electricity_and_magnetism.canonicalTitleEn: A Treatise on Electricity and Magnetism

experimental_researches_in_electricity.provenance: Collected papers by Michael Faraday, published 1839-1855.

harmonices_mundi.canonicalTitleEn: Harmonices Mundi (The Harmony of the World)
harmonices_mundi.provenance: Published by Johannes Kepler, 1619; contains his third law of planetary motion.

astronomia_nova.provenance: Published by Johannes Kepler, 1609; presents his first two laws of planetary motion.

de_revolutionibus_orbium_coelestium.canonicalTitleEn: De revolutionibus orbium coelestium (On the Revolutions of the Heavenly Spheres)

the_feynman_lectures_on_physics.provenance: Lectures by Richard Feynman, published 1963-1965 (with Leighton and Sands).

traite_elementaire_de_chimie.canonicalTitleEn: Traité élémentaire de chimie (Elementary Treatise on Chemistry)

experiments_on_plant_hybridization.provenance: Presented and published by Gregor Mendel, 1865-1866.

on_the_motion_of_the_heart_and_blood.canonicalTitleEn: De Motu Cordis (On the Motion of the Heart and Blood)
on_the_motion_of_the_heart_and_blood.provenance: Published by William Harvey, 1628; describes the circulation of blood.

systema_naturae.provenance: Published by Carl Linnaeus, first edition 1735.

molecular_structure_of_nucleic_acids.canonicalTitleEn: Molecular Structure of Nucleic Acids: A Structure for Deoxyribose Nucleic Acid
molecular_structure_of_nucleic_acids.provenance: Joint paper by James Watson and Francis Crick, Nature, 1953.

the_double_helix.provenance: Memoir written by James Watson, published 1968.

al_hawi_comprehensive_book_of_medicine.provenance: Compiled by Abu Bakr al-Razi (Rhazes), c. 9th-10th century.

the_canon_of_medicine_avicenna.canonicalTitleEn: The Canon of Medicine (al-Qanun fi al-Tibb)

the_origin_of_continents_and_oceans.canonicalTitleEn: The Origin of Continents and Oceans
the_origin_of_continents_and_oceans.provenance: Published by Alfred Wegener, 1915; proposed continental drift.

de_humani_corporis_fabrica.canonicalTitleEn: De humani corporis fabrica (On the Fabric of the Human Body)

brahmasphutasiddhanta.provenance: Written by Brahmagupta, 628 CE; first text to treat zero as a number.

on_computable_numbers.canonicalTitleEn: On Computable Numbers, with an Application to the Entscheidungsproblem

a_mathematical_theory_of_communication.provenance: Published by Claude Shannon, Bell System Technical Journal, 1948.

on_the_calculation_with_hindu_numerals.canonicalTitleEn: On the Calculation with Hindu Numerals (Kitab al-Hisab al-Hindi)
on_the_calculation_with_hindu_numerals.provenance: Written by Muhammad ibn Musa al-Khwarizmi, c. 825 CE; introduced the decimal positional system to the Islamic world.

treatise_on_demonstration_of_problems_of.canonicalTitleEn: Treatise on Demonstration of Problems of Algebra
treatise_on_demonstration_of_problems_of.provenance: Written by Omar Khayyam, 1070; classified cubic equations geometrically.

the_analytical_engine_notes.canonicalTitleEn: Notes on the Analytical Engine (Sketch of the Analytical Engine, with notes)
the_analytical_engine_notes.provenance: Translator's notes by Ada Lovelace, 1843, on Menabrea's account of Babbage's engine.

an_investigation_of_the_laws_of_thought.canonicalTitleEn: An Investigation of the Laws of Thought
an_investigation_of_the_laws_of_thought.provenance: Published by George Boole, 1854; foundation of Boolean algebra.

the_chemical_history_of_a_candle.canonicalTitleEn: The Chemical History of a Candle
the_chemical_history_of_a_candle.provenance: Christmas Lectures delivered by Michael Faraday, 1848 and 1860, published 1861.

symphony_no_9_beethoven.canonicalTitleEn: Symphony No. 9 in D minor, Op. 125 (Choral)
symphony_no_9_beethoven.provenance: Composed by Ludwig van Beethoven, premiered 1824.

symphony_no_5_beethoven.canonicalTitleEn: Symphony No. 5 in C minor, Op. 67
symphony_no_5_beethoven.provenance: Composed by Ludwig van Beethoven, premiered 1808.

moonlight_sonata_beethoven.canonicalTitleEn: Piano Sonata No. 14 (Moonlight Sonata), Op. 27 No. 2

fur_elise_beethoven.canonicalTitleEn: Für Elise (Bagatelle No. 25 in A minor)
fur_elise_beethoven.provenance: Composed by Ludwig van Beethoven, c. 1810.

the_marriage_of_figaro_mozart.canonicalTitleEn: The Marriage of Figaro (Le nozze di Figaro), K. 492
the_marriage_of_figaro_mozart.provenance: Composed by Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart, premiered 1786.

requiem_mozart.provenance: Composed by Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart, 1791 (left unfinished at his death; completed by Süssmayr).

the_magic_flute_mozart.provenance: Composed by Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart, premiered 1791.

don_giovanni_mozart.provenance: Composed by Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart, premiered 1787.

the_well_tempered_clavier_bach.provenance: Composed by Johann Sebastian Bach, Book I 1722, Book II 1742.

brandenburg_concertos_bach.provenance: Composed by Johann Sebastian Bach, dedicated 1721.

st_matthew_passion_bach.provenance: Composed by Johann Sebastian Bach, premiered 1727.

toccata_and_fugue_in_d_minor_bach.canonicalTitleEn: Toccata and Fugue in D minor, BWV 565
toccata_and_fugue_in_d_minor_bach.provenance: Traditionally attributed to Johann Sebastian Bach, c. early 18th century.

goldberg_variations_bach.provenance: Composed by Johann Sebastian Bach, published 1741.

mass_in_b_minor_bach.provenance: Composed by Johann Sebastian Bach, completed 1749.

messiah_handel.provenance: Composed by George Frideric Handel, premiered 1742.

water_music_handel.provenance: Composed by George Frideric Handel, premiered 1717.

music_for_the_royal_fireworks_handel.canonicalTitleEn: Music for the Royal Fireworks, HWV 351
music_for_the_royal_fireworks_handel.provenance: Composed by George Frideric Handel, premiered 1749.

the_ring_cycle_wagner.canonicalTitleEn: Der Ring des Nibelungen (The Ring Cycle)
the_ring_cycle_wagner.provenance: Composed by Richard Wagner, completed 1874; first full cycle 1876.

the_barber_of_seville_rossini.canonicalTitleEn: The Barber of Seville (Il barbiere di Siviglia)

the_nutcracker_tchaikovsky.provenance: Composed by Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky, premiered 1892.

swan_lake_tchaikovsky.provenance: Composed by Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky, premiered 1877.

symphony_no_6_pathetique_tchaikovsky.canonicalTitleEn: Symphony No. 6 in B minor (Pathétique), Op. 74
symphony_no_6_pathetique_tchaikovsky.provenance: Composed by Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky, premiered 1893.

the_rite_of_spring_stravinsky.canonicalTitleEn: The Rite of Spring (Le Sacre du printemps)

symphony_no_9_from_the_new_world_dvorak.canonicalTitleEn: Symphony No. 9 in E minor (From the New World), Op. 95

a_german_requiem_brahms.canonicalTitleEn: A German Requiem (Ein deutsches Requiem), Op. 45

the_book_of_healing.provenance: Written by Ibn Sina (Avicenna), completed c. 1027.

rudolphine_tables_kepler.provenance: Compiled by Johannes Kepler from Tycho Brahe's observations, published 1627.

the_alpha_helix_structure_of_proteins.canonicalTitleEn: The Structure of Proteins (alpha helix paper)
the_alpha_helix_structure_of_proteins.provenance: Co-authored by Linus Pauling and Robert Corey, 1951; describes the alpha helix.

two_new_sciences_galileo.canonicalTitleEn: Discourses and Mathematical Demonstrations Relating to Two New Sciences

on_the_equilibrium_of_heterogeneous_subs.canonicalTitleEn: On the Equilibrium of Heterogeneous Substances
on_the_equilibrium_of_heterogeneous_subs.provenance: Published by Josiah Willard Gibbs, 1875-1878; foundation of chemical thermodynamics.

the_descent_of_man.canonicalTitleEn: The Descent of Man, and Selection in Relation to Sex

molecular_configuration_in_sodium_thymon.canonicalTitleEn: Molecular Configuration in Sodium Thymonucleate (Photo 51 paper)
molecular_configuration_in_sodium_thymon.provenance: Joint paper by Rosalind Franklin and Raymond Gosling, Nature, 1953.

conics_apollonius.provenance: Written by Apollonius of Perga, c. 200 BCE.

almagest_ptolemy.provenance: Written by Claudius Ptolemy, c. 150 CE.

al_tasrif_al_zahrawi.provenance: Compiled by Abu al-Qasim al-Zahrawi (Albucasis), c. 1000 CE; landmark surgical encyclopedia.

the_hippocratic_corpus.provenance: Traditionally attributed to Hippocrates of Kos and his school, c. 5th-4th century BCE. [corrected 2026-06-27: the Corpus is a multi-author compilation, not a single Hippocratic work].

de_materia_medica.provenance: Written by Pedanius Dioscorides, c. 50-70 CE; foundational pharmacopoeia.

gray_s_anatomy.provenance: Written by Henry Gray (illustrated by H. V. Carter), first published 1858.
